claimText: ETH Zurich requires transparency about GenAI use: students must declare which tools they used and for which parts of their work; lecturers must communicate when GenAI use is permitted and make their own GenAI use visible.

citation.citationTitle: AI in Teaching and Learning — ETH Zurich
